items.question: What values does range(3) produce?
items.explanation: range(n) starts at 0 and stops before n, yielding 0, 1, 2.

items.question: A loop's else clause runs when…
options: the loop body raises an exception
the loop completes without executing break
the loop executes at least one break
the loop never runs at all
items.answer: the loop completes without executing break
items.explanation: for/while else executes only if no break interrupted the loop.

items.question: Which statement immediately exits the nearest enclosing loop?
items.explanation: break terminates the loop; continue only skips to the next iteration; pass does nothing.

items.question: In a match statement, which case acts as the default/wildcard?
items.explanation: The underscore pattern `case _:` matches anything and serves as the fallback branch.
